basic_details.job_title: TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) Staff Nurse Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A walk-in interview has been announced for Staff Nurse posts under the TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) or B.Sc. (Nursing)
qualification.details: General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) or B.Sc. (Nursing) Preferably with one year clinical experience. Maharashtra Nursing Council (MNC) Registration Certificate is compulsory. Hepatitis 'B' Vaccination (all doses) Certificate is compulsory.

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TMC ACTREC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Staff Nurse (A1 Facility and Property Managers Pvt. Ltd.)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) or B.Sc. (Nursing) Preferably with one year clinical experience. Maharashtra Nursing Council (MNC) Registration Certificate is compulsory. Hepatitis 'B' Vaccination (all doses) Certificate is compulsory.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Staff Nurse (GNM): Rs. 33,000/- per month Staff Nurse (B.Sc. Nursing): Rs. 35,000/- per month Staff Nurse (Experience Allowance): Rs. 1,500/- (Rupees One Thousand Five Hundred only) for every completed year of experience.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: MCQ test will be conducted and eligible candidates will be shortlisted for the interview.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The interview is scheduled for 02 August 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed General Nursing and Midwifery (GNM) or B.Sc. (Nursing). One year of clinical experience is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Staff Nurse post is 35 years as of the interview date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Staff Nurse role?
faq.answer: For GNM holders, the salary is Rs. 33,000/- per month. For B.Sc. (Nursing) graduates, it is Rs. 35,000/- per month, plus an additional Rs. 1,500/- per year of experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Staff Nurse positions at TMC ACTREC.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring their Bio-data, photograph, Aadhaar Card, PAN CARD, qualification certificates, experience certificates, MNC registration, and Hepatitis 'B' Vaccination Certificate (originals and self-attested copies).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an MCQ test, followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC), Kharghar, Maharashtra, 410210.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: The Staff Nurse position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Does TMC ACTREC offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any such provisions.
